overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy approaching a tribal fortification with glowing green symbols, entering a dark wooden tunnel containing a mechanical watcher creature, then transitioning to a vast desert shoreline with Joshua trees under a dark stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal fortification entrance with glowing ritual markings

events.description: character enters the dark wooden tunnel through the fortified gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the tribal gate with weapon drawn, approaching the entrance between wooden palisade walls

entered.detail: large wooden gate structure with spiked palisades and green glowing tribal symbols
tall defensive wall made of wooden logs and spikes
massive curved metal structure looming in the background sky
bioluminescent green paint markings on the gate stones

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a fortified tribal settlement at night. The wooden palisade walls flank the dirt path, leading to a gate adorned with mysterious glowing green symbols. A massive rusted metal arch looms in the stormy sky overhead as the character walks steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark wooden tunnel with mechanical guardian

events.description: mechanical watcher creature with glowing orange eyes detected standing alert in the tunnel

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through the dark tunnel, observing the mechanical creature ahead while navigating between wooden beams

notable_agents.action: mechanical watcher creature with glowing orange eyes and metallic body, standing alert in the tunnel

entered.detail: rough hewn wooden beams and planks forming the tunnel structure
glowing green tribal paint on wooden support beams inside the tunnel
flickering orange fire light illuminating the tunnel depths

segments.scene_description: Inside the narrow wooden tunnel, the lighting shifts to artificial sources from torches and bioluminescent markings. The rough wooden walls create a confined passage where a mechanical watcher creature with glowing orange eyes stands alert, creating a tense atmosphere as the character cautiously advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert lakeshore with scattered Joshua trees

events.description: exits the tunnel into open desert landscape with large body of water and Joshua trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shoreline, moving between Joshua trees with water to the left and desert dunes to the right

entered.detail: large body of water with rippled surface reflecting the dark sky
tall spiky desert trees scattered across the sandy terrain
rolling sandy hills extending into the distance
snow-capped peak visible on the horizon beyond the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast desert landscape under a stormy night sky. The character walks along the shoreline of a large lake, passing between Joshua trees scattered across the sandy terrain. Snow-capped mountains are visible in the far distance across the water as the journey continues along the rippled sand.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic entrance of a tribal fortification into a vast, stormy desert wilderness. It begins on a dirt path flanked by wooden palisade walls, moving toward a gate adorned with glowing green symbols beneath a massive rusted metal arch. As the camera passes through the gate, the environment shifts into a narrow wooden tunnel lit by torches and bioluminescent markings, where a mechanical watcher with glowing orange eyes stands alert. The scene then opens abruptly from the confined passage into an expansive desert landscape under a dark, stormy night sky. Finally, the camera tracks along a rippled sandy shoreline dotted with Joshua trees, stretching toward distant snow-capped mountains across a large lake.
